tasks.description: Ensure the format of the test output is clear, readable, and includes actionable '💡 How to fix:' instructions if mirrors are unreachable to reduce developer cognitive load on failure.
Ensure the format of logged error messages in custom script traps is clear, uses structural visual cues, and includes actionable steps.
Ensure the format of logged error messages in custom script traps is clear, uses structural visual cues, and includes actionable steps.
Verify that the new CHANGELOG.md and updated URLs are correctly formatted and accessible.
Verify the formatting and structure of the newly initialized CHANGELOG.md.
Verify the formatting and structure of the newly created docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md.
Ensure that the now-enabled YAML validation errors from verify_build_profile.sh are cleanly presented in the GitHub Actions log output, helping developers quickly identify syntax issues.
Ensure any failures related to tightened systemd sandboxing (e.g., permission denied) are logged with clear, actionable context for developers.
Ensure the ShellCheck output format is readable. Consider using `--format=gcc` or similar structured formats that integrate well with CI environments to produce clear annotations for developers.
